Färkkilä - Nelson group joint meeting 9.12.2024

Agenda 
Introductions
Group presentations
Discussion 
Specific questions

Anniina Färkkilä, MD PhD
Assistant Professor, Specialist in Gynecology
Research Program in Systems Oncology, FIMM and HiLIFE, University of Helsinki and 
Helsinki University Hospital, Finland

OncosysOVA – Systems Oncology Approach to Optimize Ovarian Cancer Treatment (NCT06117384)

500 patients recruited 2019-2024 
Samples at diagnosis: FF, FFPE, ctDNA, plasma, serum
Curated clinical data: Ovca_DB
Analyses: 
Genomics: WES, bulkRNAseq, HRD testing
Immunogenomics 
Genomic and functional HRD testing
Single cell spatial TME
tCycIF, spatial transcriptomics
Functional testing of IO combinations: iPDCs

Image processing

Staining and image acquisition

Single-cell data
quantification

Single-cell spatial profiling of the TME

Multiplexed tissue cyclic immunofluorescence (tCycIF)
Formalin Fixed Paraffin Embedded (FFPE) tissue samples
up to 100 antibodies for cell types and functional states

Farkkila A, et al. Nat Comm. 2020;11(1):1459.
TME, tumour microenvironment.

www.cycif.org

Single-cell spatial 
phenotypes

TLS project

Färkkilä and Nelson Lab meeting
9.12.24

Outline

Patterns in Tissue Architecture
Investigate distinct patterns or structural changes in tissue linked to TLS presence across diverse clinical and molecular profiles

Comparison of LAgg and TLS Regions
Analyze spatial and functional differences between TLSs and other LAgg-containing samples

Proteomic and Transcriptomic Insights
Examine tissue areas associated with LAgg or TLS (GC, T cell zone, stroma, tumor)

We aim to understand TLS structures and their development in ovarian cancer

TLSs are enriched in IDS omentum compared to other tissue sites

TLS

Lymphoid aggregates (Lagg)

Specific questions - TLS Biology

Why do some tumors fail to form TLSs? 
Role of tumor genetics
Influence of transcriptomics
Differences in TLS and GC Patterns:
TLSs are enriched in IDS samples, but in HRP patients, GCs are found already in PDS: is there something different in these tumors?
Milky Spots and TLS Development
What is the relationship between milky spots and TLS development?
Could milky spots be part of this process?

Methodologies

t-CycIF

https://github.com/farkkilab/image_processing

GeoMx

Launonen, I.-M., Niemiec, I., Hincapié-Otero, M., et al. (2024). Chemotherapy induces myeloid-driven spatially confined T cell exhaustion in ovarian cancer. Research Program in Systems Oncology, University of Helsinki. Available online: December 9, 2024.

Proteopicks

Questions for Nelson Lab - Methods

Antibodies for CyCIF:
Which specific antibodies are recommended for CyCIF staining, particularly for CD138 and BCL6/AICDA?
Class Switching in B Cells
How can we study if a given B cell has undergone class switching?
What challenges do IgG and IgA staining present?
BCR Study Methods:
What are the most efficient approaches to study BCRs, considering options like spatial BCRseq, bulkseq, and alternatives to costly outsourcing to Adaptive?
How can we best study antibody targets and types, including isolating B cells from tumor organoids or producing antibodies from single-cell BCR sequences?
